quality_summary.useful_as: behavioral curriculum reinforcement and route/proof discipline reminder

specific_gap: 15k school staging is repetitive drill material; avoid active memory bloat while preserving the 30 useful behavior topics.
next_action_candidate: Use compact 30-topic digest as intake signal; do not merge raw 15k into active memory.
proof_needed: future reuse proof before any active memory merge
validator_hint: Validate packet shape and confirm direct_active_memory_mutation_allowed=false before any merge.
boundary: Packet is compact intake candidate only. It does not mutate active memory and rejects raw 15k promotion.
